name: ingrain-security
description: Threat analysis for coding agents to identify potential security issues in code and design.

interface.longDescription: Folds security back into a finished implementation plan: triages the change, then for security-relevant changes runs threats → risk score → user-selected mitigations via read-only subagents.
defaultPrompt: Use Ingrain Security to threat-model this implementation plan before I write code.
Run Ingrain Security on the change I just designed.
